name: RossLabs
description: Developer productivity plugins for Claude Code

bookmark.description: Session context continuity — auto-save and restore context across compactions and terminal closures

claude-code-debugger.description: Debugging memory — learn from past bugs with verdict-based retrieval, pattern extraction, and parallel domain assessment

ibr.description: UI validation — verify implementations match intent with live page scanning, visual regression, and native simulator checks

navgator.description: Architecture tracking — map dependencies, analyze impact, and visualize your stack before making changes
